params.name: No Longer Human
params.description:
On Jan 1, 2018 AD, Ozama wrote his own pain into No Longer Human.
No Longer Human is a semi-autobiographical work by Japanese author Ozama. The book consists of a preface, an afterword, and three chapters that chronicle the life of the protagonist from childhood to middle age. To escape reality, the protagonist slowly descends into tragic self-destruction. The author's deep pain can be felt from his stagnant prose. After completing this work, Ozama, who attempted suicide several times, finall …
